coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 3-group, 170-node closure.
validation: Exact Blender topology and four-decimal bounds across fifteen cases covering pixelation (including the empty endpoint), crop with zero and rounded fillets, full-color mode, density/structure extremes, and HSV/contrast controls. Grid exposes Blender's point-domain UV field and Image Texture performs linear CLIP sampling of the packed queen-of-swords image. A reproducible Blender 5.1.2 Eevee fixture now renders the packed authored material at 768x768. A direct Blender Generated-coordinate diagnostic proves that the planar Z axis evaluates to 0.5; the WebGL reconstruction now preserves that degenerate-axis rule before its 3D Voronoi lookup. Aligned evidence has 0.9956 surface-mask IoU, but 0.3066 binary-mask disagreement, 0.4336 macro luminance correlation, and -0.0999 mean-luminance delta; shader parity is therefore not claimed. The remaining mismatch is localized to Voronoi/hash and Eevee filtering semantics rather than Generated-coordinate normalization.
